title: SMARTer single cell total RNA sequencing.
author: Verboom K Everaert C Bolduc N Livak KJ Yigit N Rombaut D Anckaert J Lee S Veno MT Kjems J Speleman F Mestdagh P Vandesompele J
content: S-EPMC6895261 PMC6895261 SMARTer single cell total RNA sequencing. Single cell RNA sequencing methods have been increasingly used to understand cellular heterogeneity. Nevertheless, most of these methods suffer from one or more limitations, such as focusing only on polyadenylated RNA, sequencing
